category_sources: Official cargo-generate documentation describes it as a developer tool for creating new Rust projects from git repository templates.
source_facts.description says cargo-generate uses pre-existing git repositories as templates.
display_name_sources: source_facts.repo is the official cargo-generate/cargo-generate repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo identifies cargo-generate/cargo-generate as the official source repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/cargo-generate/cargo-generate, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official cargo-generate documentation describes Rust project generation from pre-existing git repository templates.
source_facts.description explicitly mentions using git repositories as templates.
